title: cucurbita pepo subsp. fraterna
intro: Cucurbita pepo subsp. fraterna, also known as the 'Hubbard' or 'Galeux d'Eysines' squash, is a type of winter squash that belongs to the Cucurbitaceae family. This plant is known for its unique, warty skin and sweet, nutty flavor. The medicinal properties of Cucurbita pepo subsp. fraterna include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of consuming this plant include its high content of vitamins, minerals, and fiber, which can help to support immune function, promote healthy digestion, and provide relief from symptoms of colds and flu; it can also be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and poultices.
